name: U.S. Bank Smartly™ Visa Signature® Card

welcome_offer.description: No standard public welcome offer verified on the official U.S. Bank page.

earning_rates.notes: Unlimited 2% cash back when rewards are redeemed into an eligible U.S. Bank deposit account.
Total 2.5% cash back on first $10,000 in eligible net purchases each billing cycle with Smartly Savings plus qualifying balances.
Total 3% cash back on first $10,000 in eligible net purchases each billing cycle with Smartly Savings plus qualifying balances.
Total 4% cash back on first $10,000 in eligible net purchases each billing cycle with Smartly Savings plus qualifying balances.

sources.notes: Official U.S. Bank Smartly Visa Signature Card page; verified 2026-06-13.

relationship_bonus.requirements: Requires U.S. Bank Smartly Savings and qualifying balances in eligible U.S. Bank Smartly Checking and/or Safe Debit accounts; enhanced rates apply to first $10,000 in eligible net purchases each billing cycle.

notes: Base 2% cash back; relationship bonus can raise total cash back to 2.5%, 3%, or 4% on the first $10,000 in eligible net purchases each billing cycle when requirements are met.
